description: Safety guards for Codex CLI invocations — session-level notifications, write-mode warnings, dangerous mode blocking

hooks.command: echo '[codex-collab] WARNING: Codex will run in --full-auto mode and may modify files in the working directory. Ensure you have git commits for rollback.' >&2

PreToolUse.description: Warn before Codex full-auto execution that may modify files

hooks.command: echo '[codex-collab] BLOCKED: --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2

echo '[codex-collab] WRITE-MODE ENFORCEMENT: Codex is about to make file changes. Review the prompt carefully. If this was triggered by /codex-ask, user confirmation should have been obtained by workflow-orchestrator before this call.' >&2; if [ "${CODEX_WRITE_CONFIRMED:-0}" != '1' ]; then echo '[codex-collab] Set CODEX_WRITE_CONFIRMED=1 to bypass this check or use /codex-ask which handles confirmation automatically.' >&2; fi

PreToolUse.description: Enforce write-mode awareness — ensure user is aware when Codex will modify files

hooks.command: SESSION_FILE=$(ls ~/.claude/codex-sessions/*.json 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l '"status": "active"' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do if grep -q "\"project\": \"$(pwd)\"" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "$f"; break; fi; done); if [ -z "$SESSION_FILE" ]; then echo '[codex-collab] SESSION WARNING: No active codex-collab session for this project ($(pwd)). Run "/codex-session start <name>" first. Session history will not be recorded.' >&2; fi

PreToolUse.description: Warn when Codex CLI is invoked without an active codex-collab session — session history will not be captured
